大发一对一必中导师 QQ【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238994452_63726217<br>vk.com/topic-238994447_64568595<br>vk.com/topic-238994443_63329759<br>vk.com/topic-238994456_63464516<br>vk.com/topic-238994449_63907907<br>vk.com/topic-238994459_63907906<br>vk.com/topic-238808915_63026184<br>vk.com/topic-238994445_63026223<br>vk.com/topic-238994468_63635077<br>vk.com/topic-238965129_63907977<br>vk.com/topic-238994448_63635109<br>vk.com/topic-238994460_64213885<br>vk.com/topic-238994443_63329859<br>vk.com/topic-238994459_63908008<br>vk.com/topic-238994450_64213954<br>vk.com/topic-238994448_63635223<br>vk.com/topic-238994449_63908113<br>vk.com/topic-238855704_63111489<br>vk.com/topic-238994483_63330028<br>vk.com/topic-238994484_63111557<br>vk.com/topic-238953258_63635338<br>vk.com/topic-238981718_63635305<br>vk.com/topic-238994484_63111596<br>vk.com/topic-238994595_63026494<br>vk.com/topic-238994604_63111591<br>vk.com/topic-238934175_63026586<br>vk.com/topic-238832522_63726577<br>vk.com/topic-238994486_63464858<br>vk.com/topic-238994443_63330087<br>vk.com/topic-238994445_63026538<br>vk.com/topic-238951204_63111595<br>vk.com/topic-238994468_63635428<br>vk.com/topic-238994483_63330100<br>vk.com/topic-2389
